description: One who creates music; a person skilled in producing melody and rhythm. 'Sulai' names who brings music—hands or voice making what moves the heart.
sound_symbolism: The word sounds with beauty. 'Su' sustains with flowing tone, music beginning. 'La' lifts with melodic rise, song soaring. Then 'i' rises to bright beauty.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo sulai' (the musician). Creates 'neri' (song/music). Related to 'sheru' (poet) as sound-maker to word-maker.

pillars.art-nouveau-aesthetics: Musician as artist—beauty created through organized sound.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Musician as bard—keeper of songs that carry culture and memory.
